title: HTML Support for item updates
excerpt: When sending an HTML email to an item on our Marketing board it turns up with strange spacing and visible padding. Would be fantastic if the “Write updates via email” feature could properly support HTML emails!

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: When sending an HTML email to an item on our Marketing board it turns up with strange spacing and visible padding. Would be fantastic if the “Write updates via email” feature could properly support HTML emails!
